retry_reason: Failure of bpf_prog_get_fd_by_id indicates the program with the given id does not exist or is inaccessible, which is not transient under normal circumstances; retrying with the same id would also fail.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to retrieve the name of a BPF program given its ID, not to manage reference counts. It temporarily acquires and releases a file descriptor (and thus a refcount) internally, but does not expose any reference-counted object to the caller. The refcount operation is incidental to the main goal of string extraction.
